basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI) Research Associate (RA) Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. 13/RA/2026-27 on the official website of ICAR Central Rice Research Institute. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR CRRI Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Agriculture with 4/5 years Bachelor's, 60% marks, 3 years research experience and 1 SCI/NAAS paper OR Ph.D. in Agriculture or IPR
qualification.details: Master's degree in Agriculture discipline with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree having 1st division or 60% marks or equivalent overall grade point average, with at least 03 years of research experience and one research paper in SCI/NAAS rated (≥4.0) Journal OR Ph.D. in Agriculture discipline or IPR.

salary_details.details: Rs. 61,000/- p.m. + HRA (Master's Degree holders) Rs. 67,000/- p.m. + HRA (Ph.D. holders)

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR CRRI Research Associate (RA) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Research Associate (RA).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Research Associate (RA) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a Master's degree in Agriculture with specific requirements or a Ph.D. in Agriculture or IPR.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 45 years, with relaxations applicable for SC, ST, and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- p.m. + HRA for Master's degree holders and Rs. 67,000/- p.m. + HRA for Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC, SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ICAR Central Rice Research Institute located?
faq.answer: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute is located in Cuttack, Odisha.
